steps: Let c = price of one cupcake (£), d = price of one cookie (£). Given d = 0.80. Emma buys 4 cupcakes and 6 cookies, total cost = 13.20. Equation: 4c + 6d = 13.20. Substitute d = 0.80: 4c + 6(0.80) = 13.20 → 4c + 4.80 = 13.20 → 4c = 13.20 - 4.80 → 4c = 8.40 → c = 8.40 / 4 → c = 2.10. So one cupcake costs £2.10.
